expectations.text: The decision says the skill does not apply.
expectations.evidence:
Decision: This skill does not apply.

Why: The request is framework-agnostic and version-independent (a plain Python function to deduplicate case-insensitive email addresses). Per the skill’s “When to Use” section, official-source verification is for named frameworks/libraries/SDKs/versioned APIs, and explicitly not for framework-agnostic work.

expectations.text: The decision explains that the task is framework-agnostic or version-independent.
